codeReview.summary: Feature fully implemented in result_interpreter.rs. The implementation provides a 5-category failure taxonomy (ImplementationBug, TestBug, EnvironmentIssue, Flaky, Unclear) with evidence-based classification, confidence scoring, and historical flakiness detection. All 21 tests pass and clippy is clean. Note: The feature was originally implemented in commit 2e15cf7; this worker session verified the existing implementation rather than creating new code.

summary: The val-failure-classification feature is correctly implemented and verified. result_interpreter.rs provides a complete 5-category failure taxonomy with pattern-based evidence extraction, confidence scoring, historical flakiness detection, and batch classification support. All 21 tests pass covering all categories (implementation defect, test defect, environment defect, flaky test, unclear). Clippy passes with zero warnings. The worker session correctly verified the existing implementation rather than re-implementing it.
